files.file: update the version at each request where code change happened. version segments go up to 99.

# Aether ## Features ## Data sources ## Jet Stream layer ## Heat-detection layer ## Requirements ## Local development ## Cache version and invalidation ## Cache monitoring ## Production build ## Deploy to Vercel ## Main structure ## Accuracy ## License

# Aether improvements ## Priority 1 — Fire-layer trust and reliability ## Priority 2 — Better fire data and controls ## Priority 3 — Architecture and performance ## Priority 4 — Documentation and focused verification
# Monitoring
"watch": [ ... "ext": "ts,js,json", "ignore": [ ... "exec": "vite"

"name": "aether", "version": "0.1.58", "lockfileVersion": 3, "requires": true, "packages": { "name": "aether", "version": "0.1.58", "dependencies": { "@emotion/react": "^11.14.0", "@emotion/styled": "name": "aether", "private": true, "version": "0.1.58", "type": "module", "engines": { "node": ">=20.19.0" "scripts": { "dev": "nodemon", "start": "vite", "build": "tsc && vite build", "postbuild": "node scripts/warmWeatherCache.js", "preview": "vite preview", "test": "vitest run", "test:e2e": "playwright test", "verify": "tsc -p tsconfig.verify.json && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && npm test && vite build && node scripts/verifyPwa.js" "dependencies": { "@emotion/react": "^11.14.0", "@emotion/styled": "^11.14.1", "@mui/icons-material": "^7.1.1", "@mui/material": "^7.1.1", "@vercel/functions": "^3.7.4", "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^5.0.0", "leaflet": "^1.9.4", "react": "^19.1.0", "react-dom": "^19.1.0", "typescript": "^5.8.3", "vite": "^7.0.0" "devDependencies": { "@playwright/test": "^1.61.1", "@types/leaflet": "^1.9.21", "@types/node": "^26.0.1", "@types/react": "^19.2.17", "@types/react-dom": "^19.2.3", "nodemon": "^3.1.14", "vite-plugin-pwa": "^1.3.0", "vitest": "^4.1.9"

export const WEATHER_FRESH_CACHE_TTL = 10 * 60 const WEATHER_FRESH_CACHE_TTL = 10 * 60 export const AIR_QUALITY_FRESH_CACHE_TTL = 60 * 60 const AIR_QUALITY_FRESH_CACHE_TTL = 60 * 60 export const STALE_CACHE_TTL = 24 * 60 * 60 const STALE_CACHE_TTL = 24 * 60 * 60
export const CACHE_VERSION: number const CACHE_VERSION: number export function getCacheNamespace(name: string): string export function getClientCacheKey(name: string): string

export function isWeatherResponse(value: unknown): boolean export function isJetStreamResponse(value: unknown): boolean export function isAirQualityResponse(value: unknown): boolean export function parseProviderBody(
